github.assist.nextEditSuggestions.enable.name: AssistNextEditSuggestions
github.assist.nextEditSuggestions.enable.description: Whether to enable next edit suggestions (NES). NES can propose a next edit based on your recent changes.

github.assist.assist.reviewSelection.ena.name: AssistReviewSelection
github.assist.assist.reviewSelection.ena.description: Enables code review on current selection.
